title: Xtra Fluffy American Corn Pancakes
description: These vegan-friendly pancakes are made with corn flour and are perfect for a brunch mood, featuring a fatty and bouncy texture.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together corn flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together non-dairy milk, canola oil, and apple cider vinegar.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, the batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the preheated skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings.
Repeat the process with the remaining batter.
Let the pancakes cool for a few minutes before serving.
